reviews.review_description: I don't like it. I love it. This app is greatness exemplified to the utmost maximum profound degree of excellence.

reviews.review_title: Best box workout but lacking left hook
reviews.review_description: Also needs more combinations and body punches. Distance between left and right punches are too far its like crossing your arms, instead of doing a jab and cross

reviews.review_title: Good game with flaws i want refund!!!
reviews.review_description: i need hooks to the liver pad coming towards me and majiirty of times wont register my left or rigyt block
Really like this app - it’s the best one I’ve found that mimics hitting pads. Very clean and user friendly. Exactly what I was looking for to train with

I saw an ad for this game on Instagram. Decided to try it out so I bought it. This game is definitely worth it. Its  already good and its still in early access. It consists of some typical boxing training. And let's you adjust the speed of the things that come at you. One thing I wish there was is a way to add a required speed you have to punch at. Say your punch was too slow or weak so it dosent count. So far tho I love the game and I think its worth every penny. And I think it can be great for training if you put on wrist weights or arm weights.
This is a great workout could spend hours in this
